mapper.select:
select * from cm_transfer_account
tenant_id = #{tenantid} and (isSettlement is null or isSettlement = 0) and (auditstatus = 2 or auditstatus = 3 or auditstatus = 4 or auditstatus = 5 or (auditstatus = 1 and (paystatus = 0 or paystatus = 1 or paystatus = 2 or paystatus = 5 or paystatus = 6)))

select * from cm_transfer_account
tenant_id = #{tenantid} and isSettlement = 1 and (auditstatus = 2 or (auditstatus = 1 AND (settlestatus = 1 or settlestatus = 3 or (settlestatus = 8 and settleSuccessAmount = 0 and settleStopPayAmount = 0)))) limit 1
